title: Romantic Grassy French Cheese Ssam-Wrap
description: A delicate and savory vegetarian ssam-wrap filled with creamy French cheese, crunchy fresh herbs, and drizzled with clear honey.
instructions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Meanwhile, toast the saffron-infused ssam-wrap in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2 minutes on each side.
Warm the Brie cheese in the microwave for 10 seconds to make it soft and spreadable.
Assemble the ssam-wrap by spreading the Brie cheese on the toasted wrap, followed by a layer of chopped thyme and parsley.
Drizzle clear honey over the cheese and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
Fold the ssam-wrap in half and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the wrap is crispy.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped chives and a drizzle of olive oil.
Slice in half and serve with a side of fresh herbs, if desired.
For a more indulgent version, add some caramelized onions or roasted bell peppers to the ssam-wrap.
